languages.text: "Утверждение истинно — рациональность не была составляющей твоих расчетов. Если ты желал протекции Эксплораторов, то мог обратиться к данной единице и облегчить логистику наших перемещений. Мой ответ был бы следующим: генетор Фебрус, твои компетенции достойны уважения, но разум уязвим, а факты свершения техноереси — бессчетны. В доступе к архивам флота Осознание — отказано. Рекомендовано изъятие познаний и утилизация".

traits.locale_text: [draft] "Утверждение истинно — рациональность не была составляющей твоих расчетов. Если ты желал протекции Эксплораторов, то мог обратиться ко мне и сберечь нам путешествие. Мой ответ был бы следующим: генетор Фебрус, твои компетенции достойны уважения, но разум уязвим, а ереси бессчетны. В доступе к флоту Осознание — отказано. Рекомендовано изъятие познаний и утилизация".

"Утверждение истинно — рациональность не была составляющей твоих расчетов. Если ты желал протекции Эксплораторов, то мог обратиться к данной единице и облегчить логистику наших перемещений. Мой ответ был бы следующим: генетор Фебрус, твои компетенции достойны уважения, но разум уязвим, а факты свершения техноереси — бессчетны. В доступе к архивам флота Осознание — отказано. Рекомендовано изъятие познаний и утилизация".
traits.speaker: PascalCompanion

languages.text: "This statement is true. Rationality was never a key element within your calculations. If you were in fact seeking the protection of the Explorators, then you could have addressed this unit directly and thereby eased the logistical burden of our movements. My response would have been as follows: Genetor Februs, your competencies are worthy of a measure of respect, yet your reasoning is flawed and the recorded cases of your tech-heresy are beyond enumeration. Access to the archives of the Cognisance Fleet is hereby denied. The extraction of your knowledge and your subsequent disposal are formally recommended."

traits.locale_text: "The assertion is confirmed as true. Rationality was never a constituent element within your calculations. Had you sought the protection of the Explorators, you might have addressed this unit and thereby eased the logistical burden of our movements. My response would have been as follows: Genetor Februs, your competencies are worthy of a measure of respect, yet your reason is flawed, and the recorded instances of your techno-heresy are beyond enumeration. Access to the archives of the Fleet of Awareness is hereby denied. The extraction of your knowledge and your subsequent decommissioning are formally recommended."

languages.text: «Esa declaración es verdadera. La razón nunca fue un elemento esencial de sus cálculos. Si de verdad buscaba la protección de los Exploradores, podría haber contactado con esta unidad directamente y obviado la carga logística de nuestros traslados. Mi respuesta habría sido la siguiente: Genetor Februs, sus competencias merecen respeto, pero su razonamiento es defectuoso y el número de tecnoherejías registradas en sus actos es incalculable. El acceso a los archivos de la Flota Conciencia le queda denegado. Se recomienda formalmente la extracción de sus conocimientos y su posterior eliminación».
languages.original_text: "This statement is true. Rationality was never a key element within your calculations. If you were in fact seeking the protection of the Explorators, then you could have addressed this unit directly and thereby eased the logistical burden of our movements. My response would have been as follows: Genetor Februs, your competencies are worthy of a measure of respect, yet your reasoning is flawed and the recorded cases of your tech-heresy are beyond enumeration. traits.locale_text: «Esa declaración es verdadera. La razón nunca fue un elemento esencial de sus cálculos. Si de verdad buscaba la protección de los Exploradores, podría haber contactado con esta unidad directamente y obviado la carga logística de nuestros traslados. Mi respuesta habría sido la siguiente: Genetor Februs, sus competencias merecen respeto, pero su razonamiento es defectuoso y el número de tecnoherejías registradas en sus actos es incalculable. El acceso a los archivos de la Flota Conciencia le queda denegado. Se recomienda formalmente la extracción de sus conocimientos y su posterior eliminación».

languages.text: “此陈述正确。理性，从来就不曾是你计算中的关键要素。若你当初寻求开拓者的庇护，你本可以与本单位建立直接连接，从而减轻我们行动途中的后勤负累。我当时的回复将会如下：基因士费布鲁斯，你的专业能力值得一定程度的尊重，然而你的推论存在缺陷，且你所记录在案的技术异端行径已是不胜枚举。现正式驳回你对真理开拓者舰队档案库的访问权限。同时，正式建议：提取你的知识，并随后将你销毁。”
languages.original_text: "This statement is true. Rationality was never a key element within your calculations. If you were in fact seeking the protection of the Explorators, then you could have addressed this unit directly and thereby eased the logistical burden of our movements. My response would have been as follows: Genetor Februs, your competencies are worthy of a measure of respect, yet your reasoning is flawed and the recorded cases of your tech-heresy are beyond enumeration. Access to the archives of the Cognisance Fleet is hereby denied. The extraction of your knowledge and your subsequent disposal are formally recommended."

traits.locale_text: “此陈述正确。理性，从来就不曾是你计算中的关键要素。若你当初寻求开拓者的庇护，你本可以与本单位建立直接连接，从而减轻我们行动途中的后勤负累。我当时的回复将会如下：基因士费布鲁斯，你的专业能力值得一定程度的尊重，然而你的推论存在缺陷，且你所记录在案的技术异端行径已是不胜枚举。现正式驳回你对真理开拓者舰队档案库的访问权限。同时，正式建议：提取你的知识，并随后将你销毁。”

languages.text: « Cette affirmation est exacte. La rationalité n'a jamais été un élément clé de vos calculs. De fait, si vous aviez cherché la protection des explorators, vous auriez pu vous adresser à cette unité et ainsi alléger le poids logistique de nos déplacements. Ma réponse aurait été la suivante : Genetor Februs, vos compétences sont dignes d'un certain respect, mais votre raisonnement est erroné et il est avéré que vous avez commis un nombre incalculable de technohérésies. En conséquence, l'accès aux archives de la Flotte de la Connaissance vous est refusé. L'extraction de votre savoir et votre cessation d'activité sont formellement recommandées. »
languages.original_text: "This statement is true. Rationality was never a key element within your calculations. If you were in fact seeking the protection of the Explorators, then you could have addressed this unit directly and thereby eased the logistical burden of our movements. My response would have been as follows: Genetor Februs, your competencies are worthy of a measure of respect, yet your reasoning is flawed and the recorded cases of your tech-heresy are beyond enumeration. Access to the archives of the Cognisance Fleet is hereby denied. The extraction of your knowledge and your subsequent disposal are formally recommended."

traits.locale_text: « Cette affirmation est exacte. La rationalité n'a jamais été un élément clé de vos calculs. De fait, si vous aviez cherché la protection des explorators, vous auriez pu vous adresser à cette unité et ainsi alléger le poids logistique de nos déplacements. Ma réponse aurait été la suivante : Genetor Februs, vos compétences sont dignes d'un certain respect, mais votre raisonnement est erroné et il est avéré que vous avez commis un nombre incalculable de technohérésies. En conséquence, l'accès aux archives de la Flotte de la Connaissance vous est refusé. L'extraction de votre savoir et votre cessation d'activité sont formellement recommandées. »

languages.text: Bu önerme doğru. Rasyonellik, hiçbir zaman hesaplamalarınızın anahtar unsurlarından biri olmadı. Keşiftörlerin korumasını talep ediyor olsaydın bu birime doğrudan başvurabilir ve böylece hareketlerimizin lojistik yükünü hafifletebilirdin. Yanıtım şu olurdu: Genetör Februs, yetkinliklerin bir miktar saygıyı hak ediyor ancak mantığın kusurlu. Kayıtlı tekno kâfirlik vakaları da sayılamayacak kadar çok. Malumat Filosu'nun arşivlerine erişim reddedilmiştir. İrfanının çıkarılması ve ardından hizmetten alınma işlemi, resmen tavsiye edilmektedir."
languages.original_text: "This statement is true. Rationality was never a key element within your calculations. If you were in fact seeking the protection of the Explorators, then you could have addressed this unit directly and thereby eased the logistical burden of our movements. My response would have been as follows: Genetor Februs, your competencies are worthy of a measure of respect, yet your reasoning is flawed and the recorded cases of your tech-heresy are beyond enumeration. Access to the archives of the Cognisance Fleet is hereby denied. The extraction of your knowledge and your subsequent disposal are formally recommended."

traits.locale_text: Bu önerme doğru. Rasyonellik, hiçbir zaman hesaplamalarınızın anahtar unsurlarından biri olmadı. Keşiftörlerin korumasını talep ediyor olsaydın bu birime doğrudan başvurabilir ve böylece hareketlerimizin lojistik yükünü hafifletebilirdin. Yanıtım şu olurdu: Genetör Februs, yetkinliklerin bir miktar saygıyı hak ediyor ancak mantığın kusurlu. Kayıtlı tekno kâfirlik vakaları da sayılamayacak kadar çok. Malumat Filosu'nun arşivlerine erişim reddedilmiştir. İrfanının çıkarılması ve ardından hizmetten alınma işlemi, resmen tavsiye edilmektedir."

languages.text: "Diese Aussage ist korrekt. Rationalität war noch nie ein Schlüsselelement Eurer Berechnungen. Würdet Ihr tatsächlich den Schutz der Exploratoren suchen, hättet Ihr diese Einheit direkt ansprechen und somit die logistische Bürde unserer Bewegungen erleichtern können. Meine Antwort hätte wie folgt gelautet: Genetor Februs, Eure Kompetenzen verdienen einen gewissen Respekt, aber Euer Urteilsvermögen ist getrübt und die belegten Fälle Eurer Tech-Ketzerei sind ungezählt. Der Zugriff auf die Archive der Erkenntnisflotte wird hiermit verweigert. Die Extrahierung Eures Wissens und Eure anschließende Entfernung werden formal empfohlen."
languages.original_text: "This statement is true. Rationality was never a key element within your calculations. traits.locale_text: "Diese Aussage ist korrekt. Rationalität war noch nie ein Schlüsselelement Eurer Berechnungen. Meine Antwort hätte wie folgt gelautet: Genetor Februs, Eure Kompetenzen verdienen einen gewissen Respekt, aber Euer Urteilsvermögen ist getrübt und die belegten Fälle Eurer Tech-Ketzerei sind ungezählt. Der Zugriff auf die Archive der Erkenntnisflotte wird hiermit verweigert. Die Extrahierung Eures Wissens und Eure anschließende Entfernung werden formal empfohlen."

languages.text: 「その言明は真です。合理性は、あなたの計算の構成要素であった試しがありません。エクスプロレイターの庇護を求めていれば、あなたはこのユニットに相談し、それによって我々の移動の兵站的負担を軽減できたでしょう。自分の返答は、以下のとおりであったはずです――ゲネター・フェブラス、あなたの能力はある程度の敬意に値しますが、あなたの論理は欠陥を抱えており、記録されたテック異端の事例は枚挙にいとまがありません。コグニサンス艦隊の記録保管庫へのアクセスは、ここに拒否します。あなたの知識の抽出と、その後の退役処分を、正式に勧告します」
languages.original_text: "This statement is true. Rationality was never a key element within your calculations. If you were in fact seeking the protection of the Explorators, then you could have addressed this unit directly and thereby eased the logistical burden of our movements. My response would have been as follows: Genetor Februs, your competencies are worthy of a measure of respect, yet your reasoning is flawed and the recorded cases of your tech-heresy are beyond enumeration. Access to the archives of the Cognisance Fleet is hereby denied. The extraction of your knowledge and your subsequent disposal are formally recommended."
